name: aerospike
explanation: Modern Aerospike monitoring is OpenMetrics-based: the integration is a thin `OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2` subclass (`AerospikeCheckV2`) that scrapes the Aerospike Prometheus Exporter, which conventionally listens on port 9145 at `/metrics`. The README shows the standard Autodiscovery template `{"openmetrics_endpoint": "http://%%host%%:9145/metrics"}`. The legacy direct-info-protocol fields (`host`, `port` 3000, `tls_*`) are marked `legacy: true` / `hidden: true` and exist only for backwards compatibility. A generic OpenMetrics port probe at 9145 covers the default deployment.
notes: Requires the operator to run the Aerospike Prometheus Exporter alongside the database, but that is the upstream-recommended deployment for monitoring Aerospike v4.9+. Legacy direct mode (port 3000 info protocol) is deprecated.
